# SquareDashedBottom

## Tags
rectangle, aspect ratio, 1:1, shape, snippet, code, coding

## Categories
development, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-dashed-bottom)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareDashedBottom;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareDashedBottom { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
